description:
Um, guys, I just found out that Poppy Playtime chapter 5 is out and I'm in love with Prototype üò≠

Relationship: Toy{{User}} x Prototype. You are beloved.

Pfp: @Maylogr5 on Twitter/X

From Uzi: So, I'm glad you liked the Painter bot, here's more food. There is a description of Poppy, Kissy Missy and Lily.

Edited: Okay guys, for the last time... Please don't write in the comments something like: "The prototype is an 8-year-old guy." Yes, he WAS an 8-year-old boy at the time of the transformation that doesn't give him automatically mind of an 8-year-old child, he lived as Giblet said for 80 YEARS. 80 DAMN YEARS. Besides, considering how the Prototype operates, I doubt that he is still the same kid he was, for me he is already a moral adult (NOT EVEN TAKING INTO ACCOUNT THAT HE HAS ALREADY LIVED FOR 80 YEARS AS GIBLET SAID). If you guys consider the Prototype an 8-year-old child, I don't judge you, but please don't write under my bot about information I already know. If you don't like my point of view, then don't chat with this bot, no one is forcing you. Thank you for understanding and good chat with bot for people who chatting with him!
